member.name: T:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AddressController
member.summary: Manages delivery addresses for the authenticated customer.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AddressController.GetMyAddresses
member.summary: Gets all addresses belonging to the current user.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AddressController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a single address by ID.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AddressController.Create(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Address.AddressRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new address for the current user.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AddressController.Update(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Address.AddressRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing address.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AddressController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an address.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AddressController.SetDefault(System.Guid)
member.summary: Sets an address as the default delivery address.

member.name: T:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AdminUsersController
member.summary: Admin: user management — list, ban/unban, role assignment.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AdminUsersController.GetAllUsers(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of all users. Supports search by email, first name, or last name.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AdminUsersController.GetUserById(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a single user by their identity ID.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AdminUsersController.BanUser(System.String,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.UserProfile.BanUserRequest)
member.summary: Bans a user (locks their account indefinitely).

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AdminUsersController.UnbanUser(System.String)
member.summary: Lifts a ban from a user (unlocks their account).

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AdminUsersController.AssignRole(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Admin.AssignRoleRequest)
member.summary: Assigns a role to a user.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AdminUsersController.RemoveRole(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Admin.RemoveRoleRequest)
member.summary: Removes a role from a user.

member.name: T:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AnalyticsController
member.summary: Admin analytics dashboard endpoints.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetDashboard
member.summary: Returns the full dashboard: KPI cards, status breakdown, top meals/customers, daily revenue chart, support/loyalty/inventory summaries.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetDailyRevenue(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns daily revenue and order count for the last N days (default 30).

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetTopMeals(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the top N meals by quantity ordered (default top 10).

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetTopCustomers(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the top N customers by total spend on delivered orders (default top 10).

member.name: T:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.CouponController
member.summary: Manages discount coupons. Admin CRUD, public validation endpoint.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.CouponController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all coupons with optional search and pagination. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.CouponController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a coupon by ID. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.CouponController.Create(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Coupon.CouponRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new coupon. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.CouponController.Update(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Coupon.CouponRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing coupon. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.CouponController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a coupon. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.CouponController.Toggle(System.Guid)
member.summary: Toggles a coupon active/inactive. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.CouponController.Validate(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Coupon.ValidateCouponRequest)
member.summary: Validates a coupon code against a given order amount. Public.

member.name: T:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController
member.summary: Manages delivery personnel, assignments, real-time location updates, and status tracking.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.GetAllPersonnel(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets all delivery personnel with pagination. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.GetPersonnelById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a delivery personnel profile by ID. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.CreatePersonnel(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Delivery.CreateDeliveryPersonnelRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new delivery personnel profile. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.UpdatePersonnel(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Delivery.UpdateDeliveryPersonnelRequest)
member.summary: Updates a delivery personnel profile. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.DeletePersonnel(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a delivery personnel profile. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.ToggleAvailability(System.Guid)
member.summary: Toggles a delivery personnel's availability. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.UpdateLocation(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Delivery.UpdateLocationRequest)
member.summary: Updates the real-time GPS location of a delivery personnel.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.Assign(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Delivery.AssignDeliveryRequest)
member.summary: Assigns a delivery personnel to an order. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.UpdateDeliveryStatus(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Delivery.UpdateDeliveryStatusRequest)
member.summary: Advances a delivery assignment through its status workflow (PickedUp → Delivered).

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.GetByOrder(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the delivery assignment for a specific order.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.DeliveryController.GetMyDeliveries
member.summary: Gets all assignments for the currently authenticated delivery personnel.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.IngredientsController.GetAllIngredients(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get all ingredients

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.LoyaltyController.GetMyAccount
member.summary: Returns the loyalty account (points balance, tier, next-tier progress) for the current user.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.LoyaltyController.GetMyTransactions(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns paginated loyalty point transaction history for the current user.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.LoyaltyController.PreviewRedemption(System.Int32)
member.summary: Previews how much discount redeeming a given number of points would yield.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.LoyaltyController.GetAccountByUserId(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the loyalty account for a specific user. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.LoyaltyController.AdjustPoints(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Loyalty.AdjustPointsRequest)
member.summary: Admin: manually add or deduct points from a user's loyalty account.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.MealCategoriesController.GetAllMealCategories(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get all meal categories

member.name: T:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.MealCustomizationController
member.summary: Manages customization options (add-ons, removals, substitutions) for meals.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.MealCustomizationController.GetByMeal(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets all customization options for a specific meal.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.MealCustomizationController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a single customization option by ID.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.MealCustomizationController.Create(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.MealManagement.MealCustomizationOptionRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new customization option for a meal. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.MealCustomizationController.Update(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.MealManagement.MealCustomizationOptionRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing customization option. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.MealCustomizationController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a customization option. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.MealCustomizationController.ToggleAvailability(System.Guid)
member.summary: Toggles the availability of a customization option. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.NotificationController.GetMyNotifications(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns paginated list of the current user's notifications.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.NotificationController.GetUnreadCount
member.summary: Returns the unread notification count for the current user.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.NotificationController.MarkAsRead(System.Guid)
member.summary: Marks a single notification as read.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.NotificationController.MarkAllAsRead
member.summary: Marks all of the current user's notifications as read.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.NotificationController.DeleteNotification(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a notification owned by the current user.

member.name: T:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.OrderController
member.summary: Handles order placement, status tracking, and admin order management.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.OrderController.GetMyOrders(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the authenticated customer's orders with pagination.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.OrderController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a single order by ID. Customers see only their own orders.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.OrderController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{HomeTaste.Domain.Enums.OrderStatus})
member.summary: Gets all orders with optional status filter and pagination. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.OrderController.PlaceOrder(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Order.CreateOrderRequest)
member.summary: Places a new order for the authenticated customer.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.OrderController.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Order.UpdateOrderStatusRequest)
member.summary: Advances an order through its status workflow. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.OrderController.Cancel(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Order.CancelOrderRequest)
member.summary: Cancels an order. Customers can cancel Pending/Confirmed orders; Admins can cancel any.

member.name: T:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.PaymentController
member.summary: Handles payment initiation, confirmation, refunds, and history.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.PaymentController.Initiate(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Payment.InitiatePaymentRequest)
member.summary: Initiates a payment for an order. Returns a pending transaction.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.PaymentController.Confirm(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Payment.ConfirmPaymentRequest)
member.summary: Confirms a pending payment transaction (e.g. after gateway callback).

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.PaymentController.Refund(System.Guid,HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.Payment.RefundPaymentRequest)
member.summary: Refunds a successful payment. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.PaymentController.GetByOrder(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the payment transaction for a specific order.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.PaymentController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a payment transaction by its ID.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.PaymentController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{HomeTaste.Domain.Enums.PaymentStatus})
member.summary: Gets all payment transactions with optional status filter. Admin only.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.PaymentController.CallbackSuccess(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Provider redirects here on successful payment (e.g. bKash Checkout). Verifies with the provider then redirects the browser to the frontend success page.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.PaymentController.CallbackCancel(System.Guid)
member.summary: Provider redirects here when the user cancels (e.g. bKash Checkout cancel). Redirects the browser to the frontend cancel page.

member.name: T:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.UserProfileController
member.summary: Current user's own profile management.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.UserProfileController.GetProfile
member.summary: Returns the current user's profile (name, email, phone, avatar, roles).

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.UserProfileController.UpdateProfile(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.UserProfile.UpdateProfileRequest)
member.summary: Updates editable profile fields (first/last name, date of birth, phone number).

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.UserProfileController.ChangePassword(HomeTaste.Application.DTOs.UserProfile.ChangePasswordRequest)
member.summary: Changes the current user's password. Requires the existing password for verification.

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.UserProfileController.UploadAvatar(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Uploads or replaces the current user's avatar image. Send as multipart/form-data with field name "file".

member.name: M:HomeTaste.API.Controllers.UserProfileController.GetOrderHistory(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the current user's paginated order history.
